description_long: This is a modern two-story house featuring a flat roof and a mix of beige and gray exterior finishes. The structure includes large floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front of the house is elevated, accessible by a central staircase leading to a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and palm trees. The rear and sides of the house display a combination of solid wall sections and glass, with balconies and outdoor seating areas. The layout suggests open-plan living spaces, visible through the extensive glazing, and a garage is integrated into the lower level. The landscaping is minimalistic, with palm trees and clean lines complementing the urban setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a wooden deck featuring a pool and lounge area. The exterior combines beige and gray finishes with minimalistic landscaping and integrated garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central staircase, wooden deck, pool, and main entryway with large windows and garage below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid beige wall, upper-level balcony, and extended wooden deck with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, lounge area, and extensive glass windows opening to the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing multiple windows, flat roof, and the continuation of the deck and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase leading to a recessed entry with large glass doors, flanked by floor-to-ceiling windows and a wooden deck
